_publications._publicationTitle: Programming of Schwann Cells by Lats1/2-TAZ/YAP Signaling Drives Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: Immunolabeling further revealed robust TAZ/YAP expression in Sox10+ SCs distinctively in human MPNST versus neurofibromas
details: Successfully identified Sox10+ SCs in tumors and revealed robust TAZ/YAP expression in Sox10+ SCs distinctively in human MPNST versus neurofibromas
